action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 for activation date 2026-06-28; consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
